Synthetic visit note — for AI import tests only. Not real medical data.

Date: 2026-05-09
Patient: Test Family Member
Provider: Dr. Synth (Test Clinic)

Reviewed daily logs for the past week. Flares appear correlated with prolonged
sitting. Pressure-trigger pain at the left lateral thigh continues to be the
dominant complaint. Walking speed has improved modestly since starting the
current home program. No new neurologic symptoms reported. Sleep continues to
be fragmented; HRV trend is stable.

Plan:
- Continue current home exercises.
- Recheck in 4 weeks.
- Consider photo-comparison protocol if vasomotor signs reappear during a
  flare.
